_provenance.notes: v1 HAND-CURATED proof rows for the cost-layer golden set (Dragon scimitar divergence; obby maul non-coin currency). Bulk wiki sourcing (Bucket storeline ~6.2k rows) is a DISCLOSED v1 follow-up; no live wiki fetch happens during build. Obby maul Tokkul base price = 75001 (65001 with Karamja gloves -- a deferred account-STATE cost modifier, not modeled in v1; see research/currency-model.md). Gate fields {audience,pricing_basis,realization_channel,requires_ge} present on every row; iron-gate discipline (shop rows are audience=both, requires_ge=false). Task 7 appends the Guam seed row.
